name: Trajectory Catcher
description: Observe three irregular flights, commit an oriented and sized catcher while each projectile is hidden, and catch every emergence through swept geometry.
natural_language: Watch each flight. While it is hidden, place the full capture tunnel on the predicted continuation, rotate its axis to match the flight, and arm it before emergence.

metadata.notes: Three analytic flight rounds with visible observation, opaque occlusion, primitive catcher transforms, fixed-time swept replay, limited round replay, and unlimited local reset. Client-side schedules are necessary render state but no solution is rendered.
